changes.status_detail: Funds ~1,000 companies/yr across multiple batches. Standard deal: $500K total ($125K for 7% + $375K uncapped MFN SAFE), 3 months in San Francisco.

reviewNote: Verified against the YC apply + deal pages on 2026-06-11. Deadline and standard-deal copy confirmed; approved for apply.
rationale: Refresh YC application deadline + re-verify the standard-deal terms ahead of the next batch.
